text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While we're at the gym, Mejiro Ryan looks at me
and groans weakly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... My muscles will never be their best at
this rate...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been able to lift as much as usual during
my bench presses.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've had no luck adding weight to my chest and
leg presses either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Guh... What the heck is going on with my body?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amidst all the racing she's been doing lately, she
hasn't noticed her growing fatigue. Maybe I
should rethink her schedule...
